data.body: fd84 (clippable-convulsive-eft) implementation: (1) Guard helper scripts/release_guards.py (178 LOC) via held-out TDD — subagent got happy-path only, full 17-test held-out suite tests/unit/test_release_guards.py all GREEN (version-lockstep/ancestry via real temp git/env-preflight parsing). (2) release.yml re-keyed: trigger push:tags->workflow_dispatch(version input); new authorize job runs 4 guards (ref==main, version-lockstep, ancestry fetch-depth:0, env-preflight GET /environments/pypi + deployment-branch-policies) BEFORE build (build needs authorize); publish/github_release/mcp_registry if: tag-context->workflow_dispatch; version from inputs.version not github.ref_name; github_release drops --verify-tag, creates lightweight v* tag at run SHA post-publish. actionlint+zizmor clean (1 pre-existing suppression). (3) test_release_workflow_pins.py extended w/ 5 fd84 structural tests. (4) docs/releasing.md: added Release-source authorization section, rewrote Channels/prereqs/Hard-rules/step-2. First plan-review PASSED then 2nd came BLOCK (variance) on E4(job names test-wheel->wheel_test)/G1G2(scope missing test file)/G6(tag --verify-tag)/T8x2(preflight schema+reviewer body shape) — ALL 5 remediated in plan desc. Re-review + full make test running. mypy clean.
